description: Response body for POST /v1/lane/{finding_id}/claim — the operator claims responsibility for remediating a delegated finding. The finding's blackboard status transitions to 'claimed' and claimed_by is set. Crosses the API boundary (ADR-056 D7 criterion 6). Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 (#366). Source: src/api/v1/schemas.py, class LaneClaimResponse.

finding_id.description: UUID of the claimed blackboard entry.

claimed_by.description: Username or agent identifier that claimed the finding.

status.description: New status of the blackboard entry after claim. Expected value: 'claimed'.
